cards.front: Floating static route (backup, higher AD than primary protocol):
cards.back:
```
ip route <dest> <mask> <next-hop> <AD>
```
AD > primary protocol AD (e.g. 200 to back up OSPF AD 110)

```
ipv6 unicast-routing      ! enable IPv6 routing globally
ipv6 route <dest>/<prefix> <next-hop-ipv6>
```

cards.front: Static route AD default value: [...] (lowest of any routing source — beats everything except connected).

cards.back:
```
show ip route static
show ip route                       ! all routes
show ip route <dest-net>            ! lookup specific prefix
show running-config | include ip route
```

cards.front: How to confirm a static route is installed in the routing table?
cards.back: `show ip route` — look for `S` (static) or `S*` (static default) in the code column. Floating static only appears if primary route is down.
